'''YVH-908''' was a [[YVH-Series battle droid|YVH]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] assigned by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] to guard [[Allana Djo Solo|Allana]]. 908 went everywhere Allana went, and accompanied her several times on the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']] where 908 would be destroyed by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] during their rescue of Allana.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'' {{1st}}
